scope: B5.0 canary development-only; Z_deep frozen-random feature family; NOT confirmatory; NO tag

red_team_caveat.verdict: fidelity PASS; persist FAIL(inconclusive); overclaim MINOR_ISSUE -> commit as diagnostic-only NO-OP control
red_team_caveat.any_pos_signal_flag: MISLEADING: means only >=1 POS confirm; NOT concept power. POS_concept 10/50=0.20 is statistically IDENTICAL to NULL_cov 10/50=0.20 (Fisher OR=1.0,p=1.0); T_z higher for no-concept NULL_cov(6.15) than POS(2.83).
red_team_caveat.no_op_control: B5.0 (frozen RANDOM encoder = near-isometry) is a statistical replica of SM16 on every axis (NULL 0.20 vs 0.19, T_z 6.1 vs 6.0, session_auc 0.52, null_sd 2.9e-4 vs 3.0e-4; between-family Fisher p=0.85 NULL). It reproduces SM16 by construction and does NOT establish feature-invariance; carries ~0 info about a LEARNED representation.
red_team_caveat.inconclusive_for_safety: No separated positive control -> the low NULL_label/random rates carry ZERO safety information; the canary CANNOT adjudicate whether deep features resolve the FAIL.
red_team_caveat.under_dispersion_persists: fixed_margin_p floor-pinned in 84-92% of NULL cohorts; T_z 6-8 vs tiny null_sd_T -- same SM16/B4 collapse signature.
red_team_caveat.ci_dependence: 50 cohorts draw 30 of 54 subjects under one global transductive z-score + one frozen encoder -> outcomes correlated (effective n<50); naive binomial/Wilson anti-conservative; NO subject-cluster bound; n=50 cannot certify safety (0/50->CP upper 5.8%).
red_team_caveat.next: B5.1 (learned/SSL) is the ONLY informative continuation: positive-control-FIRST (POS must separate from NULL), then safety, n>=60, subject-cluster bound.
